strategy: This is an 18,060-health boss with three summoned boxers, so run it as a team: a hitter, supports who blade and Feint, and a healer. He resists Myth 80%, so hit with Storm or Death (+35%) and never Myth.
He summons a minion every two rounds: Ali LeftJab at the end of round 2, Rocky RightHook at the end of round 4, Tyson UpperCut at the end of round 6.
Do not waste turns killing the boxers one by one. Any minion you defeat is resummoned in the same order, so funnel damage into Evandyr instead.
Set up rounds 1 through 3, then burst Evandyr down before round 6 when all three boxers are out, using an AoE to clear whichever minions are up on the kill turn.
Expect Humongofrog AoEs from him, so keep the team topped up while you build blades.
cheatNotes: At the end of round 2 he summons Ali LeftJab, active the next round.
At the end of round 4 he summons Rocky RightHook, active the next round.
At the end of round 6 he summons Tyson UpperCut, active the next round.
Any boxer you defeat is resummoned, in the same order if several fall. Ignore the minions and focus the boss.
